Lumen - Terminal Coding Agent for Windows
=========================================

Quick Start:
  1. Run lumen-windows.exe serve --addr :8787
  2. Open http://127.0.0.1:8787 in your browser
  3. Enter your DeepSeek/OpenAI API key

Science Lab:
  lumen-windows.exe science lab
  → Open http://127.0.0.1:18992

Science Bridge (Claude Science proxy):
  lumen-windows.exe science gui
  → Open http://127.0.0.1:18990

Note: Claude Science sandbox requires macOS.
All other features work on Windows.
